vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of advanced degradation. The white rabbit anchor is missing from the current frame, and the primary specimens are no longer visible or have suffered total structural collapse.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot appears empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (Black pot appears empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (White rabbit anchor missing; Pothos absent)

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor removed; Pothos foliage absent.
plant_audit.P4: No visible plant material; soil appears desiccated.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments remain in the black pot (P3/P4 area).
biome_observations.anomalies: Total loss of biological specimens. The desk surface is clear of the previous scale anchor (rabbit).

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-3: Initial state showed a single leaf in the black pot and a white rabbit anchor.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Progressive loss of leaf turgor and eventual disappearance of the primary foliage.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Complete disappearance of all plant matter and the scale anchor. The biome is now effectively dormant or dead.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has transitioned from a state of neglect to total systemic failure. No living plant tissue is detectable in the current lighting conditions.
vision_report.anomalies: The removal of the white rabbit anchor suggests a deliberate clearing of the desk space or a significant disturbance event.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a catastrophic decline. Over the observed period, the specimens exhibited progressive wilting followed by total disappearance. The current state is characterized by empty, dry soil and the absence of the scale anchor, indicating the biome is no longer active.
